features.name: import after include of package file
features.description: Code should include an `include directive that includes a file containing a package definition, followed by an `import statement for that package

features.name: imported package type in module port
features.description: Code should include a module with an input port that uses a type defined in an imported package, where the package was included via `include

features.name: nested struct in package
features.description: Code should include a package containing nested struct typedef declarations with array dimensions and parameters
